sections.title: Fats
sections.narration: 1g of fat. saturated fat, cholesterol, and omega3 are doing most of the work. for dairy, the fat side can either add richness or drag the whole thing down.
sections.subtitleText: 1g of fat. saturated fat, cholesterol, and omega3 are doing most of the work. for dairy, the fat side can either add richness or drag the whole thing down.

sections.title: Carbs
sections.narration: 5g of carbs. sugar and glycemic index matter most here. for dairy, the question is whether the payoff is worth the baggage.
sections.subtitleText: 5g of carbs. sugar and glycemic index matter most here. for dairy, the question is whether the payoff is worth the baggage.

sections.title: Proteins
sections.narration: 90g of protein. bioavailability and amino acid quality are both strong. useful protein can rescue a lot of weaker traits here.
sections.subtitleText: 90g of protein. bioavailability and amino acid quality are both strong. useful protein can rescue a lot of weaker traits here.

sections.title: Vitamins
sections.narration: the rest is not doing much.
sections.subtitleText: the rest is not doing much.

sections.title: Minerals
sections.narration: calcium at 50% daily value stands out most. that gives this food real mineral support.
sections.subtitleText: calcium at 50% daily value stands out most. that gives this food real mineral support.

sections.title: Pros
sections.narration: pros first: can be a very convenient protein vehicle. convenience is one of dairy’s strongest practical advantages. slots into meals very easily. practical versatility matters a lot for dairy. easy to fit into familiar meals. that lowers friction for regular use.

sections.title: Cons
sections.narration: now the downsides: very processed compared with whole dairy. it wins hard on protein, but it is not the same kind of food experience. processing changes the category a lot. the label alone does not tell the whole story. fat quality varies wildly across dairy. some dairy is clean, some really is not.

closing.summary: Whey Protein Isolate has a genuinely strong overall case. the practical downsides are real, but they do not outweigh the upside. best when the protein payoff or fermentation angle outweighs the fat and sodium tradeoffs.
closing.useCaseNote: Best when the protein payoff or fermentation angle outweighs the fat and sodium tradeoffs.
closing.cta: Would you rank it the same, or nah?
